corrections.current: ὅτι ἐν ζωῇ ἔρριψα τὰ ἐνδόσθια αὐτοῦ.
corrections.correct: ὅτι ἐν ζωῇ ἔρριψεν τὰ ἐνδόσθια αὐτοῦ.
corrections.note: Printed text has ἔρριψεν, not first-person ἔρριψα.

corrections.current: (16) (16) διὰ τοῦτο παρέδωκεν Κύριος τὰς ἐπαγωγάς,
corrections.correct: (16) διὰ τοῦτο παρέδωκεν Κύριος τὰς ἐπαγωγάς,
corrections.note: Duplicate marginal verse marker (16) in transcription; page shows it once.

corrections.current: και εν γη αυτου εκρυψι ℵc.a
corrections.correct: και εν γη αυτου εκρυψεν ℵc.a

corrections.note: Printed apparatus accents the form σκόπτει.
Apparatus reads ιατρος, not accusative ιατρον.
The abbreviation is printed with rough breathing on omicron (ὁ = article), not Latin-style o.
Missing closing bracket after lemma τελευτησει.
Superscript numeral and accenting as printed.
Corrector siglum is Aac, not plain Aa.
Printed siglum appears to include c before superscript 2.
No change to text content; included only to flag uncertainty about exact siglum formatting around ℵ correctors.

uncertain.note: The abbreviation before και αυτος αυριον may be omicron with breathing/abbreviation mark; exact typographic form is small but clearly not plain Latin 'o'.
Corrector notation after A* is small; likely Aac and Ac2(vid), but exact superscript formatting is difficult to resolve from the scan.

notes: Running head matches. Body is accurate except for ἔρριψεν and duplicated (16). Apparatus mostly matches, with a few clear omissions/misreadings and some small siglum-format uncertainties.
